name: Quest Resource Holding Corp
summary: Quest Resource Holding Corporation is a national provider of waste and recycling management services to multi-location businesses across multiple industry sectors. The company creates customer-specific programs for collection, processing, recycling, disposal, and tracking of waste streams and recyclables including cardboard, pallets, metal, glass, motor oil, scrap tires, food waste, cooking oil, plastics, and construction debris. Quest serves big box retailers, grocers, transportation operators, manufacturers, automotive businesses, multifamily properties, restaurant chains, and construction projects, helping customers achieve sustainability and ESG goals while optimizing operational efficiencies and lowering costs.
